很好！我已經收集到所有必要的資訊。現在為你整理完整報告。

## 族群統計網頁 - Heatmap 顏色計算邏輯報告

我已找到「持倉族群熱力」(sector heatmap) 的完整前端程式碼實現。以下是詳細的技術分析：

### 1. 核心檔案位置

**主要實現檔案：**
- `/site/templates/heatmap.html` - HTML模板與JavaScript實現
- `/site/static/stock_futures.js` - 股期儀表板中的相關函數

### 2. 顏色計算邏輯

#### 顏色調色盤定義
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 179 行
```javascript
const HEATMAP_COLORS_11 = ['#0b4a26','#1a6e3a','#2e8b4d','#4fa66a','#7dbf92','#6e7681','#c89e9e','#d77272','#d1344f','#b91c34','#8b0b22'];
```

這是11色的漸層色卡（從深綠→灰→深紅）：
- `#0b4a26` - 深綠（大幅下跌）
- `#6e7681` - 灰色（持平，0%）
- `#8b0b22` - 深紅（大幅上漲）

#### 績效區間分界點
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 180-181 行
```javascript
const BREAKS_DAILY      = [-9,-7,-5,-3,-1, 1, 3, 5, 7, 9];
const BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH = [-27,-21,-15,-9,-3, 3, 9,15,21,27];
```

- **日線模式**：每隔2%為一個區間（-10%以下 → -9% → -7% → ... → +9% → +10%以上）
- **週線/月線模式**：每隔6%為一個區間（-30%以下 → -27% → -21% → ... → +27% → +30%以上）

#### 顏色映射函數
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 185-191 行
```javascript
function retColorJS(v, tf) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(Number(v))) return '#6e7681';  // 無效值→灰色
  const breaks = (tf === 'daily') ? BREAKS_DAILY : BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH;
  let idx = 0;
  for (const b of breaks) { if (v < b) break; idx++; }
  return HEATMAP_COLORS_11[idx];
}
```

**邏輯說明：**
1. 輸入績效值 `v` 與時間框架 `tf`（'daily'/'weekly'/'monthly'）
2. 選擇對應的分界點陣列
3. 從左到右遍歷分界點，找到第一個大於績效值的位置
4. 該位置即為色卡索引，返回對應顏色

### 3. 績效正負值對應的顏色 Mapping

**日線模式（±10%範圍）：**
```
績效值 < -9%  → #0b4a26（深綠，最跌）
-9% ≤ v < -7% → #1a6e3a
-7% ≤ v < -5% → #2e8b4d
-5% ≤ v < -3% → #4fa66a
-3% ≤ v < -1% → #7dbf92（淺綠）
-1% ≤ v < +1% → #6e7681（灰色，持平）
+1% ≤ v < +3% → #c89e9e（淺粉）
+3% ≤ v < +5% → #d77272
+5% ≤ v < +7% → #d1344f
+7% ≤ v < +9% → #b91c34
績效值 ≥ +9%  → #8b0b22（深紅，最漲）
```

**週線/月線模式（±30%範圍）：**
使用相同色卡，但區間擴大為 ±6% 的倍數

### 4. 視覺化圖例展示

**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 80-113 行

HTML中硬編碼的圖例 swatches 對應色卡：
```html
<!-- 日線圖例 -->
<span class="swatch" style="background:#0b4a26">-10%</span>
<span class="swatch" style="background:#1a6e3a">-8%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#6e7681">0%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#8b0b22">+10%</span>

<!-- 週線/月線圖例 (id="legend-wm") -->
<span class="swatch" style="background:#0b4a26">-30%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#8b0b22">+30%</span>
```

### 5. 相關的 Tooltip 與數據綁定

**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 213-249 行

在 tooltip 中實時計算顏色並顯示績效值：
```javascript
const retC = retColorJS(ret, currentTf);  // 根據當日績效計算顏色
return `
  <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;">
    <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">報酬 </span>
      <b style="color:${retC};font-size:18px;">${ret >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${ret.toFixed(2)}%</b>
    </div>
    <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">成交額 </span>
      <b style="color:#e5e7eb;">${fmt(amt)}</b>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

### 6. 相關數據結構

**Heatmap 數據格式：** `heatmap.html` 第 165-169 行
```javascript
window.HEATMAP_DATA = {
  daily:   {{ heatmap_daily|safe }},      // 日線數據
  weekly:  {{ heatmap_weekly|safe }},     // 週線數據
  monthly: {{ heatmap_monthly|safe }},    // 月線數據
};
```

每個族群的數據結構：
```javascript
{
  name: "族群名稱",
  value: [成交金額, 績效百分比],  // e.g., [1500, 3.25] 表示 3.25% 漲幅
  category: "分類",
  symbol: "代碼",
  children: [子股票清單]  // 點擊族群後展開的個股
}
```

### 7. 核心特色

- **動態色階轉換**：根據時間框架自動切換區間分界點，保持視覺一致性
- **灰色中性點**：0% 績效統一為 `#6e7681`（灰色），清晰標示持平
- **非對稱但均衡**：雖然顏色數量相同，但綠色（下跌）與紅色（上漲）的色調深度不同，便於視覺識別
- **容錯機制**：無效/缺失績效值自動返回灰色

這套實現使得交易者能快速掌握市場資金熱點與族群績效走勢。
```
</details></tool-use>

158	<script>
159	  window.STATIC_PREFIX = "";

161	<script src="data/search-data.js" defer></script>
162	<script src="static/app.js" defer></script>
163	
164	<script>
165	window.HEATMAP_DATA = {
166	  daily:   {{ heatmap_daily|safe }},
167	  weekly:  {{ heatmap_weekly|safe }},
168	  monthly: {{ heatmap_monthly|safe }},
169	};
170	window.addEventListener('load', () => {
171	  const chart = echarts.init(document.getElementById('heatmap'), 'dark', { renderer: 'canvas' });
172	  const chartEl = document.getElementById('heatmap');
173	  const categorySelect = document.getElementById('heatmap-category');
174	  const scopeSummaryEl = document.getElementById('heatmap-scope-summary');
175	  const visibleCountEl = document.getElementById('heatmap-visible-count');
176	  const visibleRetEl = document.getElementById('heatmap-visible-ret');
177	  const leadersEl = document.getElementById('heatmap-leaders');
178	
179	  const HEATMAP_COLORS_11 = ['#0b4a26','#1a6e3a','#2e8b4d','#4fa66a','#7dbf92','#6e7681','#c89e9e','#d77272','#d1344f','#b91c34','#8b0b22'];
180	  const BREAKS_DAILY      = [-9,-7,-5,-3,-1, 1, 3, 5, 7, 9];
181	  const BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH = [-27,-21,-15,-9,-3, 3, 9,15,21,27];
182	  const TOP_GROUP_LIMIT = 120;
183	  const LEADER_LIMIT = 8;
184	
185	  function retColorJS(v, tf) {
186	    if (!Number.isFinite(Number(v))) return '#6e7681';
187	    const breaks = (tf === 'daily') ? BREAKS_DAILY : BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH;
188	    let idx = 0;
189	    for (const b of breaks) { if (v < b) break; idx++; }
190	    return HEATMAP_COLORS_11[idx];
191	  }
192	
193	  // ─────────── 純字串 formatter（不用 rich，避免 rich 覆蓋 align 的雷）───────────
194	  // 回傳 "股名\n+X.XX%"，字級由 labelLayout 動態決定
195	  function makeLeafFormatter(stripCode) {
196	    return (p) => {
197	      const v = p.value;
198	      if (!v) return '';
199	      const ret = v[1] || 0;
200	      let name = p.name || '';
201	      if (stripCode) {
202	        name = name.split(' (')[0];
203	        if (name.length > 7) name = name.slice(0, 7);
204	      }
205	      const retStr = `${ret >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${ret.toFixed(2)}%`;
206	      return `${name}\n${retStr}`;
207	    };
208	  }
209	  const catFormatter   = makeLeafFormatter(false);
210	  const groupFormatter = makeLeafFormatter(false);
211	  const stockFormatter = makeLeafFormatter(true);
212	
213	  // 共用 tooltip（retColor 依 currentTf 套對應色階）
214	  const sharedTooltip = {
215	    confine: true,
216	    backgroundColor: 'rgba(15,20,28,0.96)',
217	    borderColor: '#374151', borderWidth: 1,
218	    padding: [12, 16],
219	    textStyle: { color: '#e5e7eb', fontSize: 13 },
220	    extraCssText: 'box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-radius: 10px;',
221	    formatter: (info) => {
222	      const v = Array.isArray(info.value)
223	        ? info.value
224	        : (info.data && Array.isArray(info.data.value) ? info.data.value : null);
225	      if (!v || v.length < 2) return `<b>${info.name}</b>`;
226	      const ret = Number(v[1]);
227	      const amt = Number(v[0]);
228	      if (!Number.isFinite(ret) || !Number.isFinite(amt)) return `<b>${info.name}</b>`;
229	      const retC = retColorJS(ret, currentTf);
230	      const fmt = (n) => {
231	        if (n >= 100) return (n/100).toFixed(1) + ' 億';
232	        return Math.round(n*100) + ' 萬';
233	      };
234	      const path = info.treePathInfo ? info.treePathInfo.slice(1).map(x => x.name).join(' › ') : '';
235	      let hint = '';
236	      if (info.data && info.data.symbol) {
237	        hint = '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#c2410c;margin-top:8px;">點擊跳至個股頁 →</div>';
238	      } else if (info.data && info.data.children && info.treePathInfo && info.treePathInfo.length === 3) {
239	        hint = '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#c2410c;margin-top:8px;">點擊跳至題材頁 →</div>';
240	      }
241	      return `
242	        <div style="font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:4px;">${path}</div>
243	        <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:10px;color:#fff;">${info.name}</div>
244	        <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;">
245	          <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">報酬 </span><b style="color:${retC};font-size:18px;">${ret >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${ret.toFixed(2)}%</b></div>
246	          <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">成交額 </span><b style="color:#e5e7eb;">${fmt(amt)}</b></div>
247	        </div>${hint}`;
248	    }
249	  };
250	
251	  // ─────────── 單一 levels 配置：leafDepth=1 + zoomToNode ───────────
252	  // 關鍵：position 用 [50%, 50%] 座標模式（不是 'inside' 字串）才真正置於方塊中心
253	  const commonLabel = {
254	    show: true,
255	    position: ['50%', '50%'],
256	    align: 'center',
257	    verticalAlign: 'middle',
258	    color: '#fff',
259	    overflow: 'truncate',
260	    ellipsis: '…',
261	  };
262	  const levels = [
263	    // Level 0: Group（頂層，190 族群直接鋪開）
264	    {
265	      itemStyle: { borderColor: '#0a0e14', borderWidth: 4, gapWidth: 4, borderRadius: 10 },
266	      upperLabel: { show: false },
267	      label: { ...commonLabel, formatter: groupFormatter, fontWeight: 800, textShadowColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)', textShadowBlur: 4, },
268	      emphasis: { itemStyle: { borderColor: '#fbbf24', borderWidth: 3, shadowBlur: 14, shadowColor: 'rgba(251,191,36,0.7)' } }
269	    },
270	    // Level 1: Stock（點族群下鑽看個股）
271	    {
272	      itemStyle: { borderColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', borderWidth: 1, gapWidth: 1, borderRadius: 4 },
273	      upperLabel: { show: false },
274	      label: { ...commonLabel, formatter: stockFormatter, fontWeight: 700, textShadowColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)', textShadowBlur: 2, },
275	      emphasis: { itemStyle: { borderColor: '#fbbf24', borderWidth: 2, shadowBlur: 8, shadowColor: 'rgba(251,191,36,0.5)' } }
276	    }
277	  ];
278	
279	  let currentTf = 'daily';
280	  let currentScope = 'top';
281	  let currentCategory = 'all';
282	  let currentRank = 'amount';
283	
284	  function fmtAmount(n) {
285	    if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return '--';
286	    if (n >= 1000000) return `${(n / 1000000).toFixed(1)} 兆`;
287	    if (n >= 100) return `${(n / 100).toFixed(1)} 億`;
288	    return `${Math.round(n * 100)} 萬`;
289	  }
290	
291	  function fmtRet(n) {
292	    if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return '--';
293	    return `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${n.toFixed(2)}%`;
294	  }
295	
296	  function buildCategoryOptions() {
297	    const categoryStats = new Map();
298	    const daily = window.HEATMAP_DATA.daily || [];
299	    daily.forEach((group) => {
300	      const category = group.category || '未分類';
301	      const prev = categoryStats.get(category) || { amount: 0, count: 0 };
302	      prev.amount += Number(group.value && group.value[0]) || 0;
303	      prev.count += 1;
304	      categoryStats.set(category, prev);
305	    });
306	
307	    [...categoryStats.entries()]
308	      .sort((a, b) => b[1].amount - a[1].amount || a[0].localeCompare(b[0], 'zh-Hant'))
309	      .forEach(([category, stat]) => {
310	        const opt = document.createElement('option');
311	        opt.value = category;
312	        opt.textContent = `${category}（${stat.count}）`;
313	        categorySelect.appendChild(opt);
314	      });
315	  }
316	
317	  function getFilteredData() {
318	    const source = window.HEATMAP_DATA[currentTf] || [];
319	    const byCategory = currentCategory === 'all'
320	      ? source
321	      : source.filter((group) => (group.category || '未分類') === currentCategory);
322	    const visible = currentScope === 'top'
323	      ? byCategory.slice(0, TOP_GROUP_LIMIT)
324	      : byCategory;
325	    return { source, byCategory, visible };
326	  }
327	
328	  function updatePanel(visible, byCategory) {
329	    const ret = visible.length
330	      ? visible.reduce((sum, group) => sum + (Number(group.value && group.value[1]) || 0), 0) / visible.length
331	      : NaN;
332	
333	    visibleCountEl.textContent = `${visible.length} / ${byCategory.length}`;
334	    visibleRetEl.textContent = fmtRet(ret);
335	    visibleRetEl.className = Number.isFinite(ret) ? (ret >= 0 ? 'is-up' : 'is-down') : '';
336	    scopeSummaryEl.textContent = currentScope === 'top'
337	      ? `顯示${currentCategory === 'all' ? '全市場' : currentCategory}成交金額前 ${Math.min(TOP_GROUP_LIMIT, byCategory.length)} 大族群。`
338	      : `顯示${currentCategory === 'all' ? '全市場' : currentCategory}全部 ${byCategory.length} 個族群。`;
339	
340	    leadersEl.innerHTML = '';
341	    const leaders = [...visible].sort((a, b) => {
342	      if (currentRank === 'return') {
343	        return (Number(b.value && b.value[1]) || 0) - (Number(a.value && a.value[1]) || 0);
344	      }
345	      return (Number(b.value && b.value[0]) || 0) - (Number(a.value && a.value[0]) || 0);
346	    });
347	    leaders.slice(0, LEADER_LIMIT).forEach((group, index) => {
348	      const retValue = Number(group.value && group.value[1]) || 0;
349	      const li = document.createElement('li');
350	      const rank = document.createElement('div');
351	      const main = document.createElement('div');
352	      const name = document.createElement('strong');
353	      const meta = document.createElement('span');
354	      const retNode = document.createElement('b');
355	
356	      rank.className = 'leader-rank';
357	      rank.textContent = String(index + 1);
358	      main.className = 'leader-main';
359	      name.textContent = group.name;
360	      meta.textContent = `${group.category || '未分類'} · ${fmtAmount(Number(group.value && group.value[0]) || 0)}`;
361	      retNode.className = retValue >= 0 ? 'is-up' : 'is-down';
362	      retNode.textContent = fmtRet(retValue);
363	
364	      main.append(name, meta);
365	      li.append(rank, main, retNode);
366	      leadersEl.appendChild(li);
367	    });
368	  }
369	
370	  function render() {
371	    const { byCategory, visible } = getFilteredData();
372	    chartEl.classList.toggle('is-all', currentScope === 'all');
373	    chart.resize();
374	    updatePanel(visible, byCategory);
375	    chart.setOption({
376	      backgroundColor: 'transparent',
377	      animation: true,
378	      animationDurationUpdate: 400,
379	      tooltip: sharedTooltip,
380	      series: [{
381	        type: 'treemap',
382	        data: visible,
383	        width: '100%',
384	        height: '100%',
385	        roam: false,
386	        nodeClick: 'zoomToNode',    // ECharts 原生 drill-down
387	        leafDepth: 1,               // 每層只顯示當前深度的 leaf（zoom 時自動跟著新 root）
388	        squareRatio: 0.6,
389	        // ▼▼ 關鍵：用 labelLayout 強制居中 + 依 rect 大小動態算字級 + 行高避重疊 ▼▼
390	        labelLayout: function(params) {
391	          const r = params.rect;
392	          if (!r) return { align: 'center', verticalAlign: 'middle' };
393	          const side = Math.min(r.width, r.height);
394	          let fontSize;
395	          if (side > 280)      fontSize = 34;
396	          else if (side > 180) fontSize = 24;
397	          else if (side > 110) fontSize = 18;
398	          else if (side > 70)  fontSize = 14;
399	          else if (side > 40)  fontSize = 11;
400	          else                 fontSize = 9;
401	          return {
402	            x: r.x + r.width / 2,
403	            y: r.y + r.height / 2,
404	            align: 'center',
405	            verticalAlign: 'middle',
406	            fontSize: fontSize,
407	            lineHeight: Math.round(fontSize * 1.4),  // 修「股名與 %數重疊」bug
408	          };
409	        },
410	        breadcrumb: {
411	          show: true, top: 10, left: 12, height: 28,
412	          emptyItemWidth: 25,
413	          itemStyle: {
414	            color: '#161b22', borderColor: '#374151', borderWidth: 1,
415	            textStyle: { color: '#e5e7eb', fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 500 }
416	          },
417	          emphasis: { itemStyle: { color: '#ff7847', textStyle: { color: '#fff' } } }
418	        },
419	        levels: levels,
420	      }]
421	    }, true);  // notMerge 徹底替換
422	    window.requestAnimationFrame(() => chart.resize());
423	  }
424	
425	  // Click 攔截：stock leaf → 跳 company 頁；其他由 ECharts zoomToNode 處理
426	  chart.on('click', (params) => {
427	    if (params && params.data && params.data.symbol) {
428	      window.location.href = `company/${params.data.symbol}.html`;
429	    }
430	  });
431	
432	  // 時間維度 toggle + legend 切換（±10 / ±30 色階）
433	  function swapLegend(tf) {
434	    const dailyEl = document.getElementById('legend-daily');
435	    const wmEl = document.getElementById('legend-wm');
436	    if (tf === 'daily') { dailyEl.hidden = false; wmEl.hidden = true; }
437	    else                { dailyEl.hidden = true;  wmEl.hidden = false; }
438	  }
439	  document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-tf]').forEach(b => {
440	    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
441	      document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-tf]').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
442	      b.classList.add('active');
443	      currentTf = b.dataset.tf;
444	      swapLegend(currentTf);
445	      render();
446	    });
447	  });
448	
449	  document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-scope]').forEach(b => {
450	    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
451	      document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-scope]').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
452	      b.classList.add('active');
453	      currentScope = b.dataset.scope;
454	      render();
455	    });
456	  });
457	
458	  document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-rank]').forEach(b => {
459	    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
460	      document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-btn[data-rank]').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
461	      b.classList.add('active');
462	      currentRank = b.dataset.rank;
463	      const { byCategory, visible } = getFilteredData();
464	      updatePanel(visible, byCategory);
465	    });
466	  });
467	
468	  categorySelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
469	    currentCategory = categorySelect.value;
470	    render();
471	  });
472	
473	  buildCategoryOptions();
474	  render();
475	
476	  window.addEventListener('resize', () => chart.resize());
477	});
478	</script>
479	
480	</body>
481	</html>

90	    const n = num(raw);
91	    if (n == null) return null;
92	    return raw.includes('%') ? n / 100 : n;
93	  }
94	
95	  function money(value) {
96	    const n = num(value);
97	    return n == null ? '—' : Math.round(n).toLocaleString('zh-TW');
98	  }
99	
100	  function price(value) {
101	    const n = num(value);
102	    if (n == null) return '—';
103	    return n >= 1000
104	      ? n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 })
105	      : n.toLocaleString('zh-TW', { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
106	  }
107	
108	  function pct(value) {
109	    const n = num(value);
110	    if (n == null) return '—';
111	    return `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${(n * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
112	  }
113	
114	  function plainPct(value) {
115	    const n = num(value);
116	    return n == null ? '—' : `${(n * 100).toFixed(2)}%`;
117	  }
118	
119	  function leverage(value) {
120	    const n = num(value);
121	    return n == null ? '—' : `${n.toFixed(2)}x`;
122	  }
123	
124	  function signed(value, formatter) {
125	    const n = num(value);
126	    if (n == null) return '<span class="muted">—</span>';
127	    const cls = n > 0 ? 'positive' : n < 0 ? 'negative' : 'muted';
128	    const text = formatter ? formatter(n) : `${n >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${money(n)}`;
129	    return `<span class="${cls}">${text}</span>`;
130	  }
131	
132	  function lots(value) {
133	    const n = num(value);
134	    return n == null ? null : Math.max(0, Math.floor(Math.abs(n)));
135	  }
136	
137	  function todayIso() {
138	    const d = new Date();
139	    const yyyy = d.getFullYear();
140	    const mm = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
141	    const dd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
142	    return `${yyyy}-${mm}-${dd}`;
143	  }
144	
145	  function normalizePosition(pos) {
146	    return {
147	      id: String(pos.id || `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`),
148	      productId: String(pos.productId || pos.product_id || ''),
149	      direction: pos.direction === 'short' ? 'short' : 'long',
150	      targetExposure: num(pos.targetExposure) == null ? null : num(pos.targetExposure),
151	      manualLots: lots(pos.manualLots),
152	      holdingPrice: num(pos.holdingPrice),
153	      note: String(pos.note || ''),
154	      updatedAt: pos.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
155	    };
156	  }
157	
158	  function loadPositions() {
159	    try {
160	      const raw = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(storeKey) || '[]');
161	      if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw.map(normalizePosition).filter((p) => byId.has(p.productId));
162	    } catch {
163	      // 讀不到新版時嘗試舊版。
164	    }
165	    try {
166	      const legacy = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(legacyStoreKey) || '[]');
167	      if (Array.isArray(legacy)) {
168	        const migrated = legacy.map(normalizePosition).filter((p) => byId.has(p.productId));
169	        if (migrated.length) localStorage.setItem(storeKey, JSON.stringify(migrated));
170	        return migrated;
171	      }
172	    } catch {
173	      return [];
174	    }
175	    return [];
176	  }
177	
178	  function savePositions() {
179	    localStorage.setItem(storeKey, JSON.stringify(positions));
180	  }
181	
182	  function normalizeSnapshot(snap) {
183	    const summary = snap.summary || {};
184	    return {
185	      version: 1,
186	      date: String(snap.date || todayIso()).slice(0, 10),
187	      savedAt: snap.savedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
188	      source: snap.source || 'manual',
189	      priceMode: snap.priceMode === 'historic' ? 'historic' : 'current',
190	      accountEquity: num(snap.accountEquity),
191	      summary: {
192	        totalLong: num(summary.totalLong) || 0,
193	        totalShort: num(summary.totalShort) || 0,
194	        grossExposure: num(summary.grossExposure) || 0,
195	        netExposure: num(summary.netExposure) || 0,
196	        totalMargin: num(summary.totalMargin) || 0,
197	        marginUsage: num(summary.marginUsage),
198	        marginLeverage: num(summary.marginLeverage),
199	        equityLeverage: num(summary.equityLeverage),
200	        onePctPnl: num(summary.onePctPnl) || 0,
```

12	  if (!pairs.length) return;
13	
14	  let SEARCH_DATA = [];
15	
16	  function waitForData(cb, tries) {
17	    tries = tries || 0;
18	    if (window.SEARCH_DATA && Array.isArray(window.SEARCH_DATA)) {
19	      SEARCH_DATA = window.SEARCH_DATA;
20	      SEARCH_DATA.forEach(it => { it._k = (it.keywords || it.label).toLowerCase(); });
21	      cb();
22	    } else if (tries < 50) {
23	      setTimeout(() => waitForData(cb, tries + 1), 80);
24	    } else {
25	      console.warn('SEARCH_DATA 載入逾時');
26	    }
27	  }
28	
29	  function setupSearch(input, dropdown) {
30	    let activeIdx = -1;
31	    let currentResults = [];
32	
33	    function filter(q) {
34	      if (!q) return [];
35	      q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
36	      const tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
37	      return SEARCH_DATA.filter(it =>
38	        tokens.every(t => it._k.includes(t))
39	      ).slice(0, 20);
40	    }
41	
42	    function render(results) {
43	      currentResults = results;
44	      activeIdx = -1;
45	      if (!results.length) {
46	        dropdown.innerHTML = '<div class="search-item muted first">找不到相符結果</div>';
47	        dropdown.hidden = false;
48	        return;
49	      }
50	      const topics = results.filter(r => r.type === 'topic');
51	      const companies = results.filter(r => r.type === 'company');
52	      const parts = [];
53	      if (topics.length) {
54	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">題材 / 族群</div>');
55	        topics.forEach((t) => {
56	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${t.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(t)}">
57	            <strong>${t.label}</strong><small>${t.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
58	        });
59	      }
60	      if (companies.length) {
61	        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">公司 / 個股</div>');
62	        companies.forEach((c) => {
63	          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${c.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(c)}">
64	            <strong>${c.label}</strong><small>${c.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
65	        });
66	      }
67	      dropdown.innerHTML = parts.join('');
68	      dropdown.hidden = false;
69	
70	      dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
71	        el.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
72	          e.preventDefault();
73	          if (el.dataset.href) window.location.href = el.dataset.href;
74	        });
75	        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
76	          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
77	          el.classList.add('active');
78	          activeIdx = parseInt(el.dataset.idx || -1, 10);
79	        });
80	      });
81	    }
82	
83	    let debounce;
84	    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
85	      clearTimeout(debounce);
86	      debounce = setTimeout(() => {
87	        render(filter(input.value));
88	      }, 80);
89	    });
90	
91	    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
92	      if (input.value) render(filter(input.value));
93	    });
94	
95	    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
96	      if (!e.target.closest('.search-box') && !e.target.closest('.hero-search-box')) {
97	        dropdown.hidden = true;
98	      }
99	    });
100
```
</details></tool-use>

很好！我已經收集到所有必要的資訊。現在為你整理完整報告。

## 族群統計網頁 - Heatmap 顏色計算邏輯報告

我已找到「持倉族群熱力」(sector heatmap) 的完整前端程式碼實現。以下是詳細的技術分析：

### 1. 核心檔案位置

**主要實現檔案：**
- `/site/templates/heatmap.html` - HTML模板與JavaScript實現
- `/site/static/stock_futures.js` - 股期儀表板中的相關函數

### 2. 顏色計算邏輯

#### 顏色調色盤定義
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 179 行
```javascript
const HEATMAP_COLORS_11 = ['#0b4a26','#1a6e3a','#2e8b4d','#4fa66a','#7dbf92','#6e7681','#c89e9e','#d77272','#d1344f','#b91c34','#8b0b22'];
```

這是11色的漸層色卡（從深綠→灰→深紅）：
- `#0b4a26` - 深綠（大幅下跌）
- `#6e7681` - 灰色（持平，0%）
- `#8b0b22` - 深紅（大幅上漲）

#### 績效區間分界點
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 180-181 行
```javascript
const BREAKS_DAILY      = [-9,-7,-5,-3,-1, 1, 3, 5, 7, 9];
const BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH = [-27,-21,-15,-9,-3, 3, 9,15,21,27];
```

- **日線模式**：每隔2%為一個區間（-10%以下 → -9% → -7% → ... → +9% → +10%以上）
- **週線/月線模式**：每隔6%為一個區間（-30%以下 → -27% → -21% → ... → +27% → +30%以上）

#### 顏色映射函數
**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 185-191 行
```javascript
function retColorJS(v, tf) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(Number(v))) return '#6e7681';  // 無效值→灰色
  const breaks = (tf === 'daily') ? BREAKS_DAILY : BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH;
  let idx = 0;
  for (const b of breaks) { if (v < b) break; idx++; }
  return HEATMAP_COLORS_11[idx];
}
```

**邏輯說明：**
1. 輸入績效值 `v` 與時間框架 `tf`（'daily'/'weekly'/'monthly'）
2. 選擇對應的分界點陣列
3. 從左到右遍歷分界點，找到第一個大於績效值的位置
4. 該位置即為色卡索引，返回對應顏色

### 3. 績效正負值對應的顏色 Mapping

**日線模式（±10%範圍）：**
```
績效值 < -9%  → #0b4a26（深綠，最跌）
-9% ≤ v < -7% → #1a6e3a
-7% ≤ v < -5% → #2e8b4d
-5% ≤ v < -3% → #4fa66a
-3% ≤ v < -1% → #7dbf92（淺綠）
-1% ≤ v < +1% → #6e7681（灰色，持平）
+1% ≤ v < +3% → #c89e9e（淺粉）
+3% ≤ v < +5% → #d77272
+5% ≤ v < +7% → #d1344f
+7% ≤ v < +9% → #b91c34
績效值 ≥ +9%  → #8b0b22（深紅，最漲）
```

**週線/月線模式（±30%範圍）：**
使用相同色卡，但區間擴大為 ±6% 的倍數

### 4. 視覺化圖例展示

**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 80-113 行

HTML中硬編碼的圖例 swatches 對應色卡：
```html
<!-- 日線圖例 -->
<span class="swatch" style="background:#0b4a26">-10%</span>
<span class="swatch" style="background:#1a6e3a">-8%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#6e7681">0%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#8b0b22">+10%</span>

<!-- 週線/月線圖例 (id="legend-wm") -->
<span class="swatch" style="background:#0b4a26">-30%</span>
...
<span class="swatch" style="background:#8b0b22">+30%</span>
```

### 5. 相關的 Tooltip 與數據綁定

**檔案：** `heatmap.html` 第 213-249 行

在 tooltip 中實時計算顏色並顯示績效值：
```javascript
const retC = retColorJS(ret, currentTf);  // 根據當日績效計算顏色
return `
  <div style="display:flex;gap:20px;">
    <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">報酬 </span>
      <b style="color:${retC};font-size:18px;">${ret >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${ret.toFixed(2)}%</b>
    </div>
    <div><span style="color:#94a3b8;">成交額 </span>
      <b style="color:#e5e7eb;">${fmt(amt)}</b>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

### 6. 相關數據結構

**Heatmap 數據格式：** `heatmap.html` 第 165-169 行
```javascript
window.HEATMAP_DATA = {
  daily:   {{ heatmap_daily|safe }},      // 日線數據
  weekly:  {{ heatmap_weekly|safe }},     // 週線數據
  monthly: {{ heatmap_monthly|safe }},    // 月線數據
};
```

每個族群的數據結構：
```javascript
{
  name: "族群名稱",
  value: [成交金額, 績效百分比],  // e.g., [1500, 3.25] 表示 3.25% 漲幅
  category: "分類",
  symbol: "代碼",
  children: [子股票清單]  // 點擊族群後展開的個股
}
```

### 7. 核心特色

- **動態色階轉換**：根據時間框架自動切換區間分界點，保持視覺一致性
- **灰色中性點**：0% 績效統一為 `#6e7681`（灰色），清晰標示持平
- **非對稱但均衡**：雖然顏色數量相同，但綠色（下跌）與紅色（上漲）的色調深度不同，便於視覺識別
- **容錯機制**：無效/缺失績效值自動返回灰色

這套實現使得交易者能快速掌握市場資金熱點與族群績效走勢。

54	def write_text_retry(path: Path, text: str, encoding: str = "utf-8", retries: int = 6) -> None:
55	    """Windows 大量重建時偶爾會遇到短暫寫檔失敗，重試避免整個 build 中斷。"""
56	    last_err: OSError | None = None
57	    for attempt in range(retries):
58	        try:
59	            path.write_text(text, encoding=encoding)
60	            return
61	        except OSError as exc:
62	            last_err = exc
63	            if attempt == retries - 1:
64	                break
65	            time.sleep(0.35 * (attempt + 1))
66	    raise last_err

2078	def build_heatmap_data(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, name_map: dict, top_n_per_group=15) -> dict:
2079	    """產生 ECharts treemap 格式。兩層：group > stock。
2080	    第一層直接鋪 190 族群（依當期成交額降序），點擊下鑽看個股。
2081	    每個節點的顏色 Python 端就算好塞進 itemStyle.color，繞開 ECharts 多層 color mapping 的坑。"""
2082	    data_by_tf = {}
2083	    for tf, col in [("daily", "ret_1d"), ("weekly", "ret_5d"), ("monthly", "ret_20d")]:
2084	        group_nodes = []
2085	        for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
2086	            meta = get_meta(group)
2087	            rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
2088	            if rows.empty:
2089	                continue
2090	            rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(top_n_per_group)
2091	            stock_leaves = []
2092	            for sym in rows_sorted.index:
2093	                ret = rows_sorted.at[sym, col]
2094	                if pd.isna(ret):
2095	                    continue
2096	                amt = float(rows_sorted.at[sym, "amount_mn"] or 0)
2097	                ret_pct = float(ret) * 100
2098	                stock_leaves.append({
2099	                    "name":      f"{name_map.get(sym, sym)} ({sym})",
2100	                    "value":     [max(amt, 1), ret_pct],
2101	                    "symbol":    sym,
2102	                    "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(ret_pct, tf)},
2103	                })
2104	            if not stock_leaves:
2105	                continue
2106	            avg_ret_pct = float(rows[col].mean(skipna=True) or 0) * 100
2107	            total_amt_group = sum(s["value"][0] for s in stock_leaves)
2108	            group_nodes.append({
2109	                "name":      group,
2110	                "value":     [total_amt_group, avg_ret_pct],
2111	                "category":  meta["category"],
2112	                "children":  stock_leaves,
2113	                "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(avg_ret_pct, tf)},
2114	            })
2115	        # 依族群成交額大→小排序
2116	        group_nodes.sort(key=lambda g: -g["value"][0])
2117	        data_by_tf[tf] = group_nodes
2118	    return data_by_tf

2121	def build_search_data(
2122	    stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame,
2123	    name_map: dict,
2124	    industry_map: dict,
2125	    company_topics: dict,
2126	    disposal_map: dict | None = None,
2127	    market_map: dict | None = None,
2128	    ai_summaries: dict | None = None,
2129	) -> list:
2130	    """搜尋用資料。[{type, label, sub, href, keywords}]
2131	
2132	    個股：全 stock_metrics symbol 都納入。keywords 多包一層「狀態 tag」
2133	    讓使用者打關鍵字能命中：
2134	      處置 / 處置股 / 處置中 / 注意股 / 漲停 / 跌停 / 大漲 / 大跌 /
2135	      上市 / 上櫃 / 興櫃 / ETF / 熱門 / 旗艦
2136	    """
2137	    disposal_map = disposal_map or {}
2138	    market_map = market_map or {}
2139	    items = []
2140	    for group in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
2141	        meta = get_meta(group)
2142	        desc = get_topic_summary_text(group, ai_summaries, limit=50)
2143	        items.append({
2144	            "type":  "topic",
2145	            "label": group,
2146	            "sub":   desc,
2147	            "href":  f"topic/{slugify(group)}.html",
2148	            "keywords": f"{group} {meta['en']} {meta['category']} 題材 族群 概念",
2149	        })
2150	    market_label_map = {"sii": "上市", "otc": "上櫃", "rotc": "興櫃"}
2151	    for sym in stock_metrics.index:
2152	        name_raw = name_map.get(sym)
2153	        name = name_raw if isinstance(name_raw, str) and name_raw.strip() else sym
2154	        topics = company_topics.get(sym, [])
2155	        industry = industry_map.get(sym, "")
2156	
2157	        # ── 狀態 tag 收集 ──
2158	        tags: list[str] = []
2159	        badges: list[str] = []
2160	
2161	        disp_info = get_disposal_info(disposal_map, sym)
2162	        if disp_info:
2163	            tags += ["處置", "處置股", "處置中", "警示"]
2164	            status = (disp_info.get("status") or "").strip()
2165	            if "注意" in status:
2166	                tags += ["注意股"]
2167	            mm = disp_info.get("match_minutes")
2168	            if mm:
2169	                badges.append(f"⚠處置中 {mm}分")
2170	                tags += [f"{mm}分處置", f"{mm}分撮合"]
2171	            else:
2172	                badges.append("⚠處置中")
2173	
2174	        mkt_disp = market_label_map.get(market_map.get(sym, ""), "")
2175	        if mkt_disp:
2176	            tags.append(mkt_disp)
2177	
2178	        # ETF 判斷：名稱含 ETF 或代號 00 開頭 5~6 碼
2179	        name_upper = name.upper()
2180	        is_etf = ("ETF" in name_upper) or (sym.startswith("00") and len(sym) >= 4 and len(sym) <= 6)
2181	        if is_etf:
2182	            tags.append("ETF")
2183	
2184	        # 漲跌停/大漲大跌（依當日報酬）
2185	        ret1 = stock_metrics.loc[sym].get("ret_1d") if sym in stock_metrics.index else None
2186	        if ret1 is not None and pd.notna(ret1):
2187	            r = float(ret1)
2188	            if r >= 0.094:
2189	                tags.append("漲停")
2190	                badges.append("🔺漲停")
2191	            elif r <= -0.094:
2192	                tags.append("跌停")
2193	                badges.append("🔻跌停")
2194	            elif r >= 0.05:
2195	                tags.append("大漲")
2196	            elif r <= -0.05:
2197	                tags.append("大跌")
2198	
2199	        # 熱門個股（STOCK_HIGHLIGHTS 有登錄者）
2200	        hl = STOCK_HIGHLIGHTS.get(sym) if STOCK_HIGHLIGHTS else None
2201	        hl_extra = ""
2202	        if hl:
2203	            tags += ["熱門", "熱點"]
2204	            hl_extra = " ".join(
2205	                str(hl.get(k, "")) for k in ("ranking", "tech", "moat")
2206	            )
2207	
2208	        # ── sub 顯示：徽章 + 題材/產業 ──
2209	        if topics:
2210	            sub_main = " / ".join(topics[:3])
2211	        elif industry:
2212	            sub_main = industry
2213	        else:
2214	            sub_main = ""
2215	        if badges:
2216	            sub = " · ".join(badges) + (" · " + sub_main if sub_main else "")
2217	        else:
2218	            sub = sub_main
2219	
2220	        items.append({
2221	            "type":  "company",
2222	            "label": f"{name} ({sym})",
2223	            "sub":   sub,
2224	            "href":  f"company/{sym}.html",
2225	            "keywords": f"{name} {sym} {industry} {' '.join(topics)} {' '.join(tags)} {hl_extra}",
2226	        })
2227	    return items
2228	
2229	
2230	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
2231	#   模板渲染
2232	# ═══════════════════════════════════════════
2233	
2234	def slugify(name: str) -> str:
2235	    """把中文題材名轉成可用的檔名 slug（用 hash 避免系統路徑問題）"""
2236	    safe = name.replace("/", "_").replace("\\", "_").replace(" ", "")
2237	    # 保留中文但限制長度
2238	    if len(safe) > 30:
2239	        safe = hashlib.md5(name.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()[:12]
2240	    return safe
2241	
2242	
2243	def pct(v) -> str:
2244	    if v is None or (isinstance(v, float) and pd.isna(v)):
2245	        return "—"
2246	    return f"{v*100:+.2f}%"
2247	
2248	
2249	def fmt_amount(v) -> str:
2250	    """v 單位 = 百萬元。顯示兩檔「億 / 萬」，不用千萬、不用 M（1 億 = 100 百萬）"""
2251	    if v is None or pd.isna(v) or v <= 0:
2252	        return "—"
2253	    if v >= 100:                        # >= 1 億 → X.X 億
2254	        return f"{v/100:.1f} 億"
2255	    return f"{int(round(v*100))} 萬"    # < 1 億 → XXXX 萬
2256	
2257	
2258	def tv_symbol_digits(sym: str) -> str:
2259	    """抽出數字部份給 TradingView 用（例：00631L → 00631）"""
2260	    return "".join(c for c in (sym or "") if c.isdigit())
2261	
2262	
2263	def urlquote(v) -> str:
2264	    """URL 查詢參數用的百分比編碼。"""
2265	    return quote(str(v or ""), safe="")
2266	
2267	
2268	def build_env():
2269	    env = Environment(
2270	        loader=FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR)),
2271	        autoescape=select_autoescape(["html"]),
2272	    )
2273	    env.filters["pct"] = pct
2274	    env.filters["fmt_amount"] = fmt_amount
2275	    env.filters["slugify"] = slugify
2276	    env.filters["tv_symbol"] = tv_symbol_digits
2277	    env.filters["urlquote"] = urlquote
```

2061	_BREAKS_DAILY       = (-9, -7, -5, -3, -1,  1,  3,  5,  7,  9)   # ±10 scale / 2% per step
2062	_BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH  = (-27, -21, -15, -9, -3, 3, 9, 15, 21, 27)  # ±30 scale / 6% per step

2065	def ret_to_color(ret_pct: float | None, tf: str = "daily") -> str:
2066	    """ret_pct 已 × 100。daily 用 ±10% 色階（2%/檔）、週月用 ±30% 色階（6%/檔）"""
2067	    if ret_pct is None or (isinstance(ret_pct, float) and pd.isna(ret_pct)):
2068	        return "#6e7681"
2069	    breaks = _BREAKS_DAILY if tf == "daily" else _BREAKS_WEEK_MONTH
2070	    idx = 0
2071	    for b in breaks:
2072	        if ret_pct < b:
2073	            break
2074	        idx += 1
2075	    return _HEATMAP_COLORS_11[idx]
2076

2078	def build_heatmap_data(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, name_map: dict, top_n_per_group=15) -> dict:
2079	    """產生 ECharts treemap 格式。兩層：group > stock。
2080	    第一層直接鋪 190 族群（依當期成交額降序），點擊下鑽看個股。
2081	    每個節點的顏色 Python 端就算好塞進 itemStyle.color，繞開 ECharts 多層 color mapping 的坑。"""
2082	    data_by_tf = {}
2083	    for tf, col in [("daily", "ret_1d"), ("weekly", "ret_5d"), ("monthly", "ret_20d")]:
2084	        group_nodes = []
2085	        for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
2086	            meta = get_meta(group)
2087	            rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
2088	            if rows.empty:
2089	                continue
2090	            rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(top_n_per_group)
2091	            stock_leaves = []
2092	            for sym in rows_sorted.index:
2093	                ret = rows_sorted.at[sym, col]
2094	                if pd.isna(ret):
2095	                    continue
2096	                amt = float(rows_sorted.at[sym, "amount_mn"] or 0)
2097	                ret_pct = float(ret) * 100
2098	                stock_leaves.append({
2099	                    "name":      f"{name_map.get(sym, sym)} ({sym})",
2100	                    "value":     [max(amt, 1), ret_pct],
2101	                    "symbol":    sym,
2102	                    "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(ret_pct, tf)},
2103	                })
2104	            if not stock_leaves:
2105	                continue

433	<section class="sf-tab-body" data-body="sources" hidden>
434	  <section class="panel sf-notes-panel">
435	    <div class="panel-header"><h2>資料說明</h2><span class="muted">每日收盤版</span></div>
436	    <div class="sf-notes-grid">
437	      <div>
438	        <h3>資料來源</h3>
439	        <ul class="notes">
440	          <li>期貨行情：期交所政府開放資料「期貨每日交易行情」。</li>
441	          <li>商品清單：期交所「股票期貨/股票選擇權交易標的」。</li>
442	          <li>保證金：期交所「股票類保證金一覽表」與「股價指數類保證金一覽表」。</li>
443	          <li>現貨價格、族群、大盤指數：站內每日收盤資料。</li>
444	        </ul>
445	      </div>
446	      <div>
447	        <h3>計算公式</h3>
448	        <ul class="notes">
449	          <li>名目金額 = 期貨成交價 × 契約乘數。</li>
450	          <li>保證金槓桿 = 總曝險 ÷ 總保證金。</li>
451	          <li>權益槓桿 = 總曝險 ÷ 帳戶權益數。</li>
452	          <li>部位圓餅圖 = 各標的絕對名目曝險 ÷ 全部持倉絕對名目曝險。</li>
453	          <li>大盤對比槓桿圖的大盤線使用加權指數與櫃買指數原始點位，不轉成報酬率。</li>
454	          <li>舊日期補登保存的是目前畫面上的部位與總覽，不自動回推當日歷史價格。</li>
455	        </ul>
456	      </div>
457	    </div>
458	    <div class="sf-source-links">
459	      <a href="{{ stock_futures.source.daily_market }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">期貨每日交易行情</a>
460	      <a href="{{ stock_futures.source.stock_lists }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">交易標的</a>
461	      <a href="{{ stock_futures.source.margining }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">保證金</a>
462	      <a href="{{ stock_futures.source.index_margining }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">指數類保證金</a>
463	    </div>
464	  </section>
465	</section>

469	</script>

471	<script src="static/stock_futures.js"></script>

999	def load_hot_topics(top_n: int = 6) -> list[dict]:
1000	    """讀 .cache_trending.json，回傳 [{'name': ..., 'slug': ..., 'score': ...}, ...]。
1001	
1002	    降級順序：
1003	      1. cache 存在且有題材 → 取 top_n，過濾掉不在 CONCEPT_GROUPS 的
1004	      2. cache 不存在 / 解析失敗 → DEFAULT_HOT_TOPICS（固定題材）
1005	    """
1006	    fallback = [
1007	        {"name": n, "slug": slugify(n), "score": None}
1008	        for n in DEFAULT_HOT_TOPICS if n in CONCEPT_GROUPS
1009	    ][:top_n]
1010	
1011	    if not TRENDING_JSON.exists():
1012	        print(f"[hot_topics] 無 cache，使用預設題材 {[t['name'] for t in fallback]}")
1013	        return fallback
1014	    try:
1015	        d = json.loads(TRENDING_JSON.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
1016	    except Exception as e:
1017	        print(f"[hot_topics] 讀 cache 失敗：{e}，使用預設")
1018	        return fallback
1019	
1020	    topics = d.get("topics") or []
1021	    picked: list[dict] = []
1022	    for t in topics:
1023	        name = t.get("name") if isinstance(t, dict) else None
1024	        if not name or name not in CONCEPT_GROUPS:
1025	            continue
1026	        picked.append({
1027	            "name": name,
1028	            "slug": slugify(name),
1029	            "score": t.get("score"),
1030	        })
1031	        if len(picked) >= top_n:
1032	            break
1033	
1034	    if not picked:
1035	        print("[hot_topics] cache 無可用題材，使用預設")
1036	        return fallback
1037	
1038	    gen = d.get("generated_at", "?")
1039	    print(f"[hot_topics] 從 cache 取 {len(picked)} 題材（@ {gen}）: {[t['name'] for t in picked]}")
1040	    return picked
1041

1043	def load_extras() -> dict:
1044	    """載入 fetch_extras.py 產的處置股 + 集保分級（15 級歷史）。"""
1045	    empty = {"disposal": {}, "holders_history": {}, "holder_levels": []}
1046	    if not EXTRAS_JSON.exists():
1047	        print(f"[警告] 找不到 {EXTRAS_JSON.name}，個股頁將無處置警示/大戶資訊。")
1048	        print(f"       先跑：python site/fetch_extras.py")
1049	        return empty
1050	    try:
1051	        d = json.loads(EXTRAS_JSON.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
1052	    except Exception as e:
1053	        print(f"[警告] 讀 {EXTRAS_JSON.name} 失敗：{e}")
1054	        return empty
1055	    disposal = d.get("disposal") or {}
1056	    hist     = d.get("holders_history") or {}
1057	    levels   = d.get("holder_levels") or []
1058	    # 清洗 disposal 文字欄位殘留的 markdown link（如 "(./attention.html)"）
1059	    import re as _re
1060	    _URL_TAIL = _re.compile(r'\s*\((?:\./|https?://)[^\s)]+\)')
1061	    _MD_LINK  = _re.compile(r'\[([^\]]+)\]\([^\)]+\)')
1062	    for _sym, _info in disposal.items():
1063	        for _k in ("reason", "action", "detail", "name"):
1064	            _v = _info.get(_k)
1065	            if isinstance(_v, str) and ('](' in _v or '(./' in _v or '(http' in _v):
1066	                _v = _MD_LINK.sub(r'\1', _v)
1067	                _v = _URL_TAIL.sub('', _v)
1068	                _info[_k] = _re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', _v).strip()
1069	    n_weeks = len({date for by_date in hist.values() for date in by_date.keys()})
1070	    print(f"[extras] 處置股 {len(disposal)} 檔 / 集保分級 {len(hist)} 檔 / 歷史 {n_weeks} 週 / 抓取時間 {d.get('fetched_at','?')}")
1071	    return {"disposal": disposal, "holders_history": hist, "holder_levels": levels}
1072	
1073	
1074	# 三類歸屬：level index（0-based）
1075	_RETAIL_IDX = list(range(0, 8))    # level 1-8 (≤50 張)
1076	_MID_IDX    = list(range(8, 11))   # level 9-11 (50~400 張)
1077	_BIG_IDX    = list(range(11, 15))  # level 12-15 (>400 張)
1078	
1079	
1080	def build_holder_view(hist_by_date: dict, levels: list) -> dict | None:
1081	    """把 {date: {h, s, p}} 轉成前端易用的結構：
1082	      dates, levels,
1083	      holders[N週][15級], pcts[N週][15級],
1084	      retail_holders/mid_holders/big_holders: 每週人數,
1085	      retail_pct/mid_pct/big_pct: 每週佔比,
1086	      delta_retail/delta_mid/delta_big: 每週相對前週 delta 人數。"""
1087	    if not hist_by_date:
1088	        return None
1089	    dates = sorted(hist_by_date.keys())
1090	    holders_mat = [hist_by_date[d]["h"] for d in dates]
1091	    shares_mat  = [hist_by_date[d]["s"] for d in dates]
1092	    pct_mat     = [hist_by_date[d]["p"] for d in dates]
1093	
1094	    def agg_h(idxs):
1095	        return [sum(row[i] for i in idxs) for row in holders_mat]
1096	
1097	    def agg_p(idxs):
1098	        return [round(sum(row[i] for i in idxs), 2) for row in pct_mat]
1099	
1100	    retail_h = agg_h(_RETAIL_IDX)

1142	_META_LINE_RE = _re.compile(r"^\*\*(板塊|產業|市值|企業價值)[:：]\*\*")
1143	_BULLET_PREFIXES = ("- ", "* ", "• ", "・")
1144	_WIKILINK_RE = _re.compile(r"\[\[([^\[\]]+?)\]\]")
1145	_BOLD_RE = _re.compile(r"\*\*([^*\n]+?)\*\*")
1146	
1147	_DISPLAY_SOURCE_REPLACEMENTS = (
1148	    ("與 [[Yahoo 股市]] ", ""),
1149	    ("與[[Yahoo 股市]] ", ""),
1150	    ("／[[Yahoo 股市]]", ""),
1151	    ("/[[Yahoo 股市]]", ""),

1162	def strip_hidden_source_names(text: str) -> str:
1163	    """移除不希望在網站顯示的來源名稱。"""
1164	    if not isinstance(text, str) or "Yahoo" not in text:
1165	        return text
1166	    for old, new in _DISPLAY_SOURCE_REPLACEMENTS:
1167	        text = text.replace(old, new)
1168	    return text
1169	
1170	
1171	def _coverage_inline(text: str) -> str:
1172	    """Convert inline MD (wikilinks + bold) to HTML. Input may already contain raw chars."""
1173	    text = strip_hidden_source_names(text)
1174	    out = _html.escape(text)
1175	    out = _WIKILINK_RE.sub(lambda m: f'<span class="wiki-ref">{m.group(1)}</span>', out)
1176	    out = _BOLD_RE.sub(r"<strong>\1</strong>", out)
1177	    return out
1178	
1179	
1180	def _coverage_block_to_html(block: str) -> str:
1181	    """Convert a block of MD text (bullets / paragraphs / sub-headers) to HTML."""
1182	    lines = [l.rstrip() for l in block.splitlines()]
1183	    html_parts: list[str] = []
1184	    in_list = False
1185	    for raw in lines:
1186	        stripped = raw.strip()
1187	        if not stripped:
1188	            if in_list:
1189	                html_parts.append("</ul>")
1190	                in_list = False
1191	            continue
1192	        if _META_LINE_RE.match(stripped):
1193	            # 業務簡介區塊開頭的 metadata 列跳過（市值等已在別處顯示）
1194	            continue
1195	        if stripped.startswith("### "):
1196	            if in_list:
1197	                html_parts.append("</ul>")
1198	                in_list = False
1199	            html_parts.append(f'<h4 class="coverage-sub">{_coverage_inline(stripped[4:])}</h4>')
1200	            continue
1201	        is_bullet = False
1202	        body = stripped
1203	        for p in _BULLET_PREFIXES:
1204	            if body.startswith(p):
1205	                body = body[len(p):].lstrip()
1206	                is_bullet = True
1207	                break
1208	        if is_bullet:
1209	            if not in_list:
1210	                html_parts.append("<ul class=\"coverage-list\">")
1211	                in_list = True
1212	            html_parts.append(f"<li>{_coverage_inline(body)}</li>")
1213	        else:
1214	            if in_list:
1215	                html_parts.append("</ul>")
1216	                in_list = False
1217	            html_parts.append(f"<p>{_coverage_inline(stripped)}</p>")
1218	    if in_list:
1219	        html_parts.append("</ul>")
1220	    return "\n".join(html_parts)
1221	
1222	
1223	def _parse_coverage_md(content: str) -> dict:
1224	    """Split one MD file by '## ' headers → {header_prefix: html}."""
1225	    sections: dict[str, str] = {}
1226	    current_name: str | None = None
1227	    current_lines: list[str] = []
1228	    for line in content.splitlines():
1229	        if line.startswith("## "):
1230	            if current_name is not None:
1231	                sections[current_name] = _coverage_block_to_html("\n".join(current_lines).strip())
1232	            header = line[3:].strip()
1233	            # 只取 "(" 之前的標題主詞，例如 "財務概況 (單位:...)" → "財務概況"
1234	            m = _re.match(r"([^(（]+)", header)
1235	            current_name = (m.group(1).strip() if m else header)
1236	            current_lines = []

2078	def build_heatmap_data(stock_metrics: pd.DataFrame, name_map: dict, top_n_per_group=15) -> dict:
2079	    """產生 ECharts treemap 格式。兩層：group > stock。
2080	    第一層直接鋪 190 族群（依當期成交額降序），點擊下鑽看個股。
2081	    每個節點的顏色 Python 端就算好塞進 itemStyle.color，繞開 ECharts 多層 color mapping 的坑。"""
2082	    data_by_tf = {}
2083	    for tf, col in [("daily", "ret_1d"), ("weekly", "ret_5d"), ("monthly", "ret_20d")]:
2084	        group_nodes = []
2085	        for group, members in CONCEPT_GROUPS.items():
2086	            meta = get_meta(group)
2087	            rows = stock_metrics.loc[stock_metrics.index.intersection(members)].copy()
2088	            if rows.empty:
2089	                continue
2090	            rows_sorted = rows.sort_values("amount_mn", ascending=False).head(top_n_per_group)
2091	            stock_leaves = []
2092	            for sym in rows_sorted.index:
2093	                ret = rows_sorted.at[sym, col]
2094	                if pd.isna(ret):
2095	                    continue
2096	                amt = float(rows_sorted.at[sym, "amount_mn"] or 0)
2097	                ret_pct = float(ret) * 100
2098	                stock_leaves.append({
2099	                    "name":      f"{name_map.get(sym, sym)} ({sym})",
2100	                    "value":     [max(amt, 1), ret_pct],
2101	                    "symbol":    sym,
2102	                    "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(ret_pct, tf)},
2103	                })
2104	            if not stock_leaves:
2105	                continue
2106	            avg_ret_pct = float(rows[col].mean(skipna=True) or 0) * 100
2107	            total_amt_group = sum(s["value"][0] for s in stock_leaves)
2108	            group_nodes.append({
2109	                "name":      group,
2110	                "value":     [total_amt_group, avg_ret_pct],
2111	                "category":  meta["category"],
2112	                "children":  stock_leaves,
2113	                "itemStyle": {"color": ret_to_color(avg_ret_pct, tf)},
2114	            })
2115	        # 依族群成交額大→小排序
2116	        group_nodes.sort(key=lambda g: -g["value"][0])
2117	        data_by_tf[tf] = group_nodes
2118	    return data_by_tf

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-05-02 11:01:06Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Found the issue! The `sectorPerformanceMap()` function is calculating the performance wrong.

It's calculating the performance as the change in **sector weight (allocation share)** between the last snapshot and the previous snapshot:

```javascript
out[k] = (cur - old) * 100; // %
```

Where `cur` and `old` are the fraction of the sector's exposure relative to total exposure (between 0 and 1).

So `+0.96%` and `-0.96%` are NOT the actual price return of the sector. Instead, they represent:


- How much the sector's **weight in the portfolio** changed from yesterday to today

For example:
- If ASIC/IP矽智財 was 40% of total portfolio exposure yesterday and is now 40.96%, it shows +0.96%
- If CoWoS先進封裝 was 40% of total portfolio exposure yesterday and is now 39.04%, it shows -0.96%

This is wrong. The "當日績效" label implies it should be showing the **price return** of the underlying stocks in that sector for today, not the change in portfolio weight. I need to fix this by using the actual market price change (ret_1d) for the stocks in those sectors instead.

Now I'm checking whether the frontend code has access to the market return data and what fields are available in the snapshot's `positionMetrics` object to see if I can pull the daily returns from there.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-05-02 11:01:13Z)**_

找到問題了。`sectorPerformanceMap()` 計算的不是「當日漲跌%」，而是**持倉權重的變動**。

具體邏輯（[stock_futures.js:1756](site/static/stock_futures.js:1756)）：

```javascript
// aggregate 算各族群佔總曝險的比例（0~1）
out[k] = (cur - old) * 100;  // 今日比例 − 昨日比例
```

所以：
- ASIC/IP矽智財 的曝險佔比從昨天 → 今天 **增加了 0.96 個百分點**
- CoWoS先進封裝 的曝險佔比 **減少了 0.96 個百分點**

這跟股價漲跌完全無關。如果你的 ASIC 部位增加或者總曝險變小，它就會「漲」。

**正確的「當日績效」應該是：** 該族群裡各個持倉標的的今日股價報酬率加權平均。

你希望怎麼修？有兩個方向：
1. **用市場行情資料**：從 `HEATMAP_DATA`（全市場熱力圖的 `ret_1d`）取對應族群的當日漲跌
2. **用持倉損益**：用 `positionMetrics` 裡的未實現損益變動除以曝險，算出持倉的實際報酬率

哪個比較符合你的需求？

---

The snapshot stores `unrealizedPnl` and `unrealizedPnlPct` per position in `positionMetrics`. This is great!

Now let me think about how to correctly calculate the "daily performance" for each sector:

**Current (wrong) approach in `sectorPerformanceMap()`:**
- Calculate each sector's allocation weight (fraction of total exposure)
- Compare today vs yesterday's weight
- Result: shows allocation shift, not price performance

**Correct approach using P&L:**
For each sector:
- Sum up `unrealizedPnl` for all positions in that sector from `last` snapshot


- Compare against the same sum from `prev` snapshot
- The difference gives me the daily P&L change, which I divide by the sector's current gross exposure to get the daily return percentage

For positions that were added or removed between snapshots, I need to handle those carefully. The cleanest approach is to match positions across snapshots by `productId` and calculate the price change, then weight by exposure. Or I can sum the `unrealizedPnl` changes for matching positions in each sector and normalize by the current gross exposure.

In the `sectorPerformanceMap()` function, I'll iterate through each sector, find positions that exist in both snapshots, calculate their P&L changes, and aggregate by sector.

Writing the implementation... Building the sector metrics...

```md
# 修正「持倉族群熱力」當日績效計算錯誤

## Context

`stock_futures.html` 的「持倉族群熱力圖」顯示「顏色：當日績效」，但實際值（如 +0.96% / -0.96%）並非股價報酬，而是**族群持倉佔比的當日變動**，完全不代表漲跌績效。

## 根因

`site/static/stock_futures.js:1756` 的 `sectorPerformanceMap()`：

\```js
// 現在（錯誤）：算各族群曝險佔總曝險的比例差
out[k] = (cur - old) * 100;   // cur/old 是 0~1 的比例
\```

這算的是「今天 ASIC 佔總倉位的比例」vs「昨天的比例」，跟股價無關。

## 修正方案

用 `positionMetrics[].unrealizedPnl`（快照已儲存，line 550）算出每天的損益變動，再除以曝險 → 得到真實的日報酬率。

**公式：**
\```
族群日報酬% = Σ(今日各部位unrealizedPnl - 昨日各部位unrealizedPnl) / 族群grossExposure × 100
\```

## 修改內容

**唯一要改的檔案：** `site/static/stock_futures.js`，`sectorPerformanceMap()` 函數（line 1756–1785）

將原本比較 allocation weight 的邏輯，改為比較 unrealizedPnl 的變動：

\```js
function sectorPerformanceMap() {
  const sortedSnaps = snapshots.slice().sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
  if (sortedSnaps.length < 2) return {};
  const last = sortedSnaps[sortedSnaps.length - 1];
  const prev = sortedSnaps[sortedSnaps.length - 2];

  // 建立 productId → prev unrealizedPnl 的查詢表
  const prevPnlMap = new Map();
  (prev.positionMetrics || []).forEach((m) => {
    if (m && m.productId != null) prevPnlMap.set(m.productId, num(m.unrealizedPnl) ?? 0);
  });

  const sectorPnlChange = new Map();  // topic → 今日PnL變動
  const sectorExposure  = new Map();  // topic → 曝險

  (last.positionMetrics || []).forEach((m) => {
    if (!m || !m.underlyingSymbol) return;
    const topic = pickPrimaryTopic(m.underlyingSymbol);
    const lastPnl = num(m.unrealizedPnl);
    const prevPnl = prevPnlMap.has(m.productId) ? prevPnlMap.get(m.productId) : null;
    if (lastPnl != null && prevPnl != null) {
      sectorPnlChange.set(topic, (sectorPnlChange.get(topic) || 0) + (lastPnl - prevPnl));
    }
    sectorExposure.set(topic, (sectorExposure.get(topic) || 0) + Math.abs(num(m.grossExposure) || 0));
  });

  const out = {};
  sectorPnlChange.forEach((pnlChange, topic) => {
    const exposure = sectorExposure.get(topic) || 0;
    out[topic] = exposure ? (pnlChange / exposure) * 100 : 0;
  });
  return out;
}
\```

## 注意事項

- 若某部位只出現在今日快照（新開倉），`prevPnlMap` 找不到 → 不計入績效（保守處理）
- 若快照只有 1 筆，回傳 `{}` → 熱力圖顏色全灰（現有行為不變）
- `num()` 已是現有 helper，處理 null/NaN

## 驗證方式

1. 在瀏覽器開 stock_futures.html，確認有 2 筆以上快照
2. 熱力圖各族群的 % 數值應與各持倉當日損益/曝險一致
3. 若 ASIC 族群今日賺了 5萬、曝險 1000萬，應顯示約 +0.5%

```

```js
// 現在（錯誤）：算各族群曝險佔總曝險的比例差
out[k] = (cur - old) * 100;   // cur/old 是 0~1 的比例
```

這算的是「今天 ASIC 佔總倉位的比例」vs「昨天的比例」，跟股價無關。

**公式：**
```
族群日報酬% = Σ(今日各部位unrealizedPnl - 昨日各部位unrealizedPnl) / 族群grossExposure × 100
```

## 修改內容

將原本比較 allocation weight 的邏輯，改為比較 unrealizedPnl 的變動：

```js
function sectorPerformanceMap() {
  const sortedSnaps = snapshots.slice().sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));
  if (sortedSnaps.length < 2) return {};
  const last = sortedSnaps[sortedSnaps.length - 1];
  const prev = sortedSnaps[sortedSnaps.length - 2];

  const prevPnlMap = new Map();

  const out = {};
  sectorPnlChange.forEach((pnlChange, topic) => {
    const exposure = sectorExposure.get(topic) || 0;
    out[topic] = exposure ? (pnlChange / exposure) * 100 : 0;
  });
  return out;
}

If the alert appears, the handler works but `confirm` might be blocked; if nothing happens, the handler isn't firing at all.

The most likely issue I haven't considered yet is that the user might have pop-ups disabled in their browser, which would prevent `confirm` from working. blocked` in their browser for file:// URLs.**

Chrome's popup blocker can block `confirm()` dialogs if the page is considered "untrustworthy" or if the dialog isn't triggered by a user gesture. For file:// URLs this is unlikely, but possible if the user's Chrome settings block all dialogs.

Even if confirm is blocked, the code should handle it—if `confirm()` returns `false` the function exits early. But here's the issue: when Chrome's dialog blocker actually blocks the dialog, `confirm()` returns `undefined` rather than `false`. Since `!undefined` evaluates to `true`, the function would return early without doing anything, appearing as if nothing happened.

Chrome shows a "This site has been blocked from showing additional dialogs" notification, but users might miss it. The better approach is to replace `confirm()` with an inline two-step button confirmation—first click warns with a text and color change, then a second click within a few seconds actually performs the action.
</details></think>
